name: Bean Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 2 cans stewed tomatoes (one drained, one not)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix beans with about half the juice from one can of tomatoes and a couple of tablespoons of taco sauce. The mixture should be almost pourable.
2. Mix the remaining taco sauce and tomato juice in a separate container.
3. Place about a quarter of the taco sauce mixture at the bottom of a 9x13 inch lasagne pan.
4. Cover the sauce with a layer of noodles.
5. Layer, in any order desired, beans, corn, cheese, drained tomatoes, remaining sauce, and more noodles to ensure enough beans cover the top without exposing any noodles.
6. Cover tightly with foil and bake at 350°F for about an hour, or until the noodles are tender. Check every 5-10 minutes after 45 minutes of cooking.
7. Remove foil, sprinkle with black olives, and bake for another couple of minutes.
8. Let sit for about 5 minutes before serving.
Serves 3-4 as a main dish. Tastes even better the next day.
Variation: If pre-cooking the noodles, use less tomato juice and cook for only about 30 minutes.
